title: Add Python monorepo discovery/index benchmarks
description: Benchmark discovery and index build for single-folder vs recursive multi-folder layouts. Measure end-to-end latency for list/ready-like operations.
creator: Ryan Alyn Porter

comments.author: Ryan Alyn Porter
comments.text: Python benchmarks added in tools/benchmark_discovery.py (single vs multi project, serial + parallel) and tools/benchmark_index.py (index build/cache timings).

custom.beads_acceptance_criteria: Python benchmark reports timings for single vs recursive multi-project layouts and basic operations.
